message.content:
The user wants me to identify configurable operational parameters from the provided image.
The image shows two diagrams of HVAC equipment (Trane CVGF chiller).
I need to scan the labels and text for anything that looks like a parameter setting, a mode, a value, or a configuration option.

Looking at the labels:
- "机身安装启动柜（选项）" (Body-mounted start-up cabinet (optional)) - This is a component, not a parameter.
- "二级压缩机" (Secondary compressor) - Component.
- "冷凝器" (Condenser) - Component.
- "安全阀" (Safety valve) - Component.
- "蒸发器" (Evaporator) - Component.
- "油泵" (Oil pump) - Component.
- "CH530控制面板" (CH530 control panel) - This is a control panel, but the label itself isn't a parameter.
- "机组铭牌" (Unit nameplate) - Component.
- "电机" (Motor) - Component.
- "油冷却器" (Oil cooler) - Component.
